candidate_sources_rejected: menopause society summaries without an exact current UAE document
rejection_reasons: The current NG23 recommendations supersede older versions.
Patient and summary pages were not used as exact clinician guidance.
No exact current UAE menopause guideline was identified.
population_applicability: Partial: symptom and identification sections cover the baseline well, but age, premature ovarian insufficiency, treatment, and bleeding contexts require separate clinical assessment.
setting_applicability: Partial: current NICE primary and specialist care recommendations; baseline is UAE setting-agnostic.
UAE_applicability: No direct UAE applicability is established; this source requires UAE clinician and prescribing review.
recency_verification: Current NICE NG23 overview and recommendations opened on 2026-07-12; last updated and reviewed 2026-04-15.
superseded_check: The current NG23 update page was checked; older versions were not used.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Directly supports mapped vasomotor, cycle, mood, musculoskeletal, genitourinary, sexual, and quality-of-life symptom documentation.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Lists menstrual-cycle changes, vasomotor, genitourinary, mood, musculoskeletal, and sexual symptoms and their variable severity and duration.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Directly supports mapped perimenopause and menopause terms and limits generic laboratory review in the defined age and contraception contexts.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Defines symptom-and-cycle-based identification in people aged 45 or over and limits laboratory and imaging tests, including FSH in specified contexts.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Directly supports clinician-documented counselling, benefit-risk, preference, HRT discussion, and repeated review.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Requires benefit-risk discussion tailored to age, circumstances, risk factors, preferences, and repeated review when HRT is chosen.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Directly supports mapped vaginal dryness and clinician-discussed moisturiser or lubricant documentation.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Covers clinician-discussed moisturiser, lubricant, and vaginal-treatment options and ongoing review for genitourinary symptoms.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Directly supports mapped three-month and annual clinician-arranged review intervals.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Defines documented review at three months, annually thereafter, or earlier for ineffectiveness, adverse effects, or clinical need.

unresolved_source_gaps: Abnormal bleeding, suicidal ideation, examination findings, UAE prescribing, specific HRT choice, treatment initiation, and non-hormonal medication options remain unsupported by this mapping.
The perimenopause label remains clinician-stated and age-dependent.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
